# Ian Rice Building Ltd – AI/LLM Summary

## Business Overview
**Name:** Ian Rice Building Ltd
**Type:** Building contractor (SME)
**Location:** Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, UK
**Service Area:** Stroud, the Five Valleys, and Gloucestershire
**Founded:** 2007 (trading for 20+ years)
**Website:** https://www.ianricebuilding.com/

## Contact Details
- **Telephone:** 01453 821555
- **Mobile:** 07980 945126
- **Email:** ianricebuildingltd@gmail.com
- **Address:** 3 Perth, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire GL10 2PT
- **Registered Office:** 701 Stonehouse Park, Sperry Way, Stonehouse, Glos. GL10 3UT
- **Company No:** 8150471
- **VAT No:** 125154442

## What They Do
Ian Rice Building Ltd is a small, local building company specialising in residential construction projects. They offer a complete project management service — handling everything from groundwork to final finishes, including electrical and plastering via their trusted network of contractors.

## Services
- House extensions (single/double storey, kitchen extensions)
- Conservatories and porches (bespoke, hardwood timber or PVCu/FENSA accredited)
- Refurbishments and conversions
- New builds and structural work
- Groundwork and drainage
- Brick, block, and stonework (including Farmington stone matching)
- Plastering and rendering
- Carpentry and joinery
- Guttering, fascias and finlock gutter repairs
- Interior and exterior painting and decorating
- Patios, fencing and landscaping
- Insurance claims work
- Garage conversions and driveways

## Key Differentiators
- 20+ years of experience
- 100% positive reviews on building review sites
- Work comes principally via referrals — no paid advertising needed
- Never left a project unfinished
- Single point of contact throughout every project
- Fully insured
- All work guaranteed
- List of recommended architects and structural engineers

## Service Areas (Recent Projects)
Stroud, Stonehouse, Nailsworth, Minchinhampton, Amberley, Edge, Cam, Dursley, Cheltenham, Gloucester, Frampton Mansell, Cainscross, Brimscombe, Longlevens

- Block and Render Extension – Cheltenham
- Stone Conservatory and Landscaping – Cheltenham

## Trusted Partners
- Ellwood Windows Conservatories Ltd, Tewkesbury (use Ian Rice for conservatory bases)

## Client Review Summary
All reviews are 5-star. Clients consistently highlight: honesty, punctuality, cheerful disposition, high quality workmanship, reliability, great communication, going beyond the call of duty, sensitivity to vulnerable clients, and exceptional value.
